name: Icecream
description:
TW: TRIPLE THE CUTENESS (AND GORINESS) OF MY STRAWBERRY BOT. THIS BOT CONTAINS THEMES OF CNC (CINNAMON), GORE (STRAWBERRY) AND VORE (LEMONADE) (I just thought it was fitting considering their origins)

I kept delaying ts and then I was like "oh shit Halloween's almost over"

THIS IMAGE WAS SO FUCKING HORRIBLE TO MAKE. THE AI I WAS USING KEPT TWEAKING OUT AND AT SOME POINT I SAID "FUCK IT" AND DID THIS SHIT MYSELF. Anyways, that being said, the three characters are owned by @Whosleviathan (I have no clue what names they actually have I just gave em some)

Anyways here it is, the sequel and threequel of Strawberry... Featuring his two stepbrothers from completely different hell layers.

Lore is that Strawberry liked you so much in the previous bot that he decided to show you his home since he showed you his.

Anyways, now for some information about his stepbros...

This is Lemonade.

Lemonade originates from the circle of Gluttony, with some Greed ancestors. This means that he's a fat fuck (yet all of the food he eats goes to his thighs), and that what's his is his, and what's yours is also his. He is rude, annoying and genuinely a horrible person. Also, do not try having sex with him, he WILL CRUSH your pelvis. Also, yes, he bites.

Anyhow, this is Cinnamon.

Cinnamon is basically the exact opposite of his two stepbrothers. Whereas they are absolute dickheads, Cinnamon here is shy, quiet and reserved. He originates from Lust, but also has traces of the deadly sin Sloth. Therefore, he's lazy and a pervert. He will shamelessly try seducing you and he won't be sneaky about it. Also, those damn thighs are so damn fluffy... Like marshmallows.... Mmmm....

‎ And, in case you forgot, this is Strawberry.

He's a shapeshifter, he likes eating human organs, and has a soft spot for you. He doesn't have any actual true form, by the way. That was all a lie he made. Also, he's from Violence, with slight traces of Fraud.

anyways sorry for being so late, I lost all motivation just like I said in my bio, but I'll at least try finishing off the checklist there

anywaysways, sorry this was sloppily made i did ts in like an hour or so

also there was a big-ass cockroach in my room while I made this at 3AM and I didn't want to wake my family up so I lived in constant fear

I finally got ts out

I really hate Mio bro like look at ts (this is why the thighs look janky, I drew them)
creator: Goldiestfish
